# Pull Request Template

## Description
Please include a summary of your contribution and any relevant context.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New Skill
- [ ] New Agent  
- [ ] New Extension
- [ ] Documentation Update
- [ ] Bug Fix
- [ ] Other: _________

## What does this contribute?
Brief description of the value this adds to the project.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] I have read the [PUBLISHING.md](../docs/PUBLISHING.md) guide
- [ ] My documentation is complete and clear
- [ ] I have tested this locally
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, credentials, or personal information included
- [ ] File structure follows the project template
- [ ] SKILL.md/agent file includes proper frontmatter
- [ ] README includes usage examples
- [ ] Troubleshooting section included (if applicable)
- [ ] I have updated the main README if adding a featured item

## Related Issues
Fixes #[issue number] (if applicable)
Relates to #[issue number] (if applicable)

## Screenshots or Examples
If applicable, add screenshots or examples of your contribution.

## Questions or Concerns?
Feel free to ask in the comments if you need clarification on anything!

---

Thank you for contributing! 🎉
